text: Jab unhone kaha ki shehar aakar main badal gayi hoon, toh mera dimaag sunn ho gaya aur bas rona nikal pada, ab school rejection ki baat kaise karun? Mere andar bas ek hulchul si machi hai aur lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya, mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki main kya bolun ya kya sochun. Bas unki woh baat kaante ki tarah chubhi ja rahi hai aur main bas siskiyan liye ja rahi hoon.

Partner ki baat sunkar mere hosh udd gaye aur main bas deewar ko takti reh gayi, abhi toh bache ki bimari ka bojh hi nahi sambhal raha tha. Saas-bahu ke kalesh aur 'log kya kahenge' wale darr ke beech unki ye baat sunkar mera dum ghutne laga hai. Abhi mujhse koi solution mat pucho, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekh kar rone ka mann kar raha hai.

Unke 'badal gayi ho' bolte hi main bilakh uthi aur purani sari baatein dimaag mein bheed lagakar aa gayi. Bacha bimar hai, koi school lene ko taiyaar nahi aur upar se parivaar ka ye taana—mujhe toh lag raha hai main pagal ho jaungi. Abhi main hospital ka kharcha ya bache ka future nahi soch sakti, bas ye rona ruk hi nahi raha.

Jab unhone shehar ki hawa lagne ki baat ki, toh mera dil baith gaya aur main bas wahin zameen par baith gayi. Joint family mein waise hi sab mujhe bache ki disability ke liye blame karte hain aur ab ye naya zakhm. Main abhi kuch nahi kar sakti, mera poora sharir thanda pad gaya hai aur bas ek ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai.

Unki baat sunkar meri toh aatma kaanp gayi, jaise kisi ne mere khali-pan ka mazaak udaya ho. Main career chhod kar din bhar saas ki baatein aur bache ki care karke thak chuki hoon, par ab rone ke alawa kuch sujh nahi raha. Abhi mujhse mat pucho aage kya hoga, mera dimaag itna bhara hai ki main bas dher ho gayi hoon.
